General.Name: New Century Healthcare Holding Co Ltd
General.Description: New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare services to women and children in the People's Republic of China. It provides paediatric, obstetric, and gynaecologic services; and hospital consulting services. The company also provides online healthcare services, as well as operates cafeteria and gift shop at its medical institutions. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.

5.Name: Ms. Hong  Zhou
5.Title: Chief Physician, Group Chief Medical Officer & VP
